package handler

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// Positive scenario for feature_flag_lookup_without_config_abstraction.
// Rule intent: Handlers or services that query feature flags directly via
// os.Getenv instead of using a focused flag interface or config abstraction.

type CheckoutHandler struct{}

func (h *CheckoutHandler) ProcessCheckout(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	// Anti-pattern: direct os.Getenv for feature flags scattered in handler logic
	if os.Getenv("FEATURE_NEW_CHECKOUT") == "enabled" {
		h.processNewCheckout(w, r)
		return
	}
	h.processLegacyCheckout(w, r)
}

func (h *CheckoutHandler) GetPaymentMethods(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	// Anti-pattern: another direct env lookup for a different flag
	useStripe := os.Getenv("FEATURE_STRIPE") == "true"
	usePaypal := os.Getenv("FEATURE_PAYPAL") == "true"
	_ = useStripe
	_ = usePaypal
}

func (h *CheckoutHandler) ApplyDiscount(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	// Anti-pattern: yet another direct env lookup
	if os.Getenv("FEATURE_DYNAMIC_PRICING") == "on" {
		h.applyDynamicDiscount(w, r)
	}
}

func (h *CheckoutHandler) processNewCheckout(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
func (h *CheckoutHandler) processLegacyCheckout(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
func (h *CheckoutHandler) applyDynamicDiscount(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
